page_title: Shinji and Good Friends: Bakuretsu Daifūgō
text:
is a video game that was developed and published by GAINAX on 23 July 1999 for Microsoft Windows 95/98. It was sold for 7800 Yen (plus tax) when released.

Overview

A game of .

CPU: Platform capable of running Windows 95-J or Windows 98-J (Pentium or newer model recommended)
RAM: 16MB minimum (32MB or more recommended)
Display: 640x480 resolution, 8-bit (256) color minimum (800x600 resolution, 8-bit (256) color or more recommended)
CD-ROM Drive: Dual-Speed minimum (Quad-Speed or faster recommended)
Audio: Requires PCM Soundboard
Hard disk Capacity:5 MB for minimal install, 20 MB for standard install, 75 MB for total install http://web.archive.org/web/20050407085602/http://www.gainax.co.jp/soft/daifugo/index-e.html 

Characters

Shinji Ikari
Rei Ayanami
Asuka Langley Sohryu
Kaworu Nagisa
Tōji Suzuhara
Misato Katsuragi
Ritsuko Akagi
Ryoji Kaji
Gendo Ikari

Trivia

The cover was illustrated by Tadashi Hiramatsu.
